summary.zh: 结合模糊、透明度与遮罩柔和地揭示媒体或内容层。
summary.en: Reveal media or content layers with coordinated blur, opacity, and masking.

definition.zh: 用于柔化元素或掩盖细小瑕疵的模糊滤镜。
definition.en: A blur filter blends neighboring pixels to soften edges, depth layers, or transitional artifacts.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 用模糊柔化媒体或过渡边缘，并掩盖加载或合成中的细小瑕疵。
purpose.en: Use blur to soften media or transition edges and mask minor loading or compositing imperfections.

frequency.zh: 适合低频媒体揭示和背景层；正文与高频控件避免持续滤镜。
frequency.en: Use for low-frequency media reveals and background layers, avoiding persistent filters on text and frequent controls.

trigger.zh: 由媒体就绪、层级切换或焦点变化触发，模糊半径保持克制。
trigger.en: Trigger from media readiness, layer changes, or focus changes with a restrained blur radius.

enterExit.zh: 进入时模糊快速归零并同步淡入；离开仅在层级关系明确时增加模糊。
enterExit.en: Resolve blur quickly to zero with a fade on enter, adding blur on exit only when hierarchy is clear.

interruptibility.zh: 状态改变时从当前滤镜值继续，并在完成后移除不必要的 filter。
interruptibility.en: Continue from the current filter value on state changes and remove unnecessary filters after completion.

gestureRules.zh: 无需手势；可拖动遮罩和裁切比较归入专用交互模式。
gestureRules.en: No gesture is required; draggable masks and clipping comparisons belong to dedicated interaction patterns.

reducedMotion.zh: 直接显示清晰内容，仅保留静态层级和透明度变化。
reducedMotion.en: Show crisp content directly, preserving only static hierarchy and opacity changes.

reviewNotes.zh: 检查 filter 对大面积绘制和低端设备的成本。
reviewNotes.en: Measure filter cost on large paint areas and lower-end devices.

reviewNotes.zh: 明确区分 Blur、Clip-path 与 Mask。
reviewNotes.en: Distinguish Blur, Clip-path, and Mask explicitly.
